summary: Issue #491 TikTok Business account-holder OAuth callback: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Public GET callback with HMAC state validation, Marketing API token exchange (10s timeout), encrypted persistence under capability business_account_holder with isolation from Shop and Advertiser credential rows. 10/10 unit tests pass; no secrets in response bodies; logs use auth_code_len only.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: persist_account_holder_tokens no-ops without raising when token payload is incomplete; callback may return 200 without a stored row.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Consider 502 or structured warning if exchange succeeds but required token fields are absent once live TikTok responses are verified.

criticalFindings.description: State verified with HMAC-SHA256 via hmac.compare_digest; forged/tampered state rejected with 401 before token exchange.
Structured logs record auth_code_len and tiktok_error_code only; unit tests assert access/refresh tokens absent from HTTP responses.

mappings.criterion: Route reachable without JWT; missing required params return 400
Successful mocked exchange persists encrypted account-holder credentials for Juli user in state
Does not write into Shop Partner or Advertiser credential rows incorrectly
Unit route tests missing params bad state exchange failure
